ci_source: .github/workflows/test.yml unit-tests job (CI uses `uv run pytest` with identical flags; matrix py3.11/3.12/3.13; local baseline run on the project venv)
invocation_deviation: CI's `uv run pytest` fails in this checkout: 'Failed to canonicalize script path' — working-directory path contains '&' and spaces (OneDrive path). Fell back to venv python -m pytest, flag-identical.
